FreeAgent:

Bratwurst on Rails

Posted on 02 September 2008 by Johannes Fahrenkrug. Tags: Ruby rails Conferences RailsConf
I'm in Salon 4 at the Maritim pro Arte hotel in Berlin waiting for the Community Code Drive to begin at 10. Yesterday's Bratwurst on Rails event was fun. It was raining really hard, though and in my opinion they were a little stingy with the prizes. I was able to meet a couple of developer friends and make some new ones. It was interesting to meet some guys from ELC Tech (please note: you pronounce every single letter of ELC, the company has nothing to do with the animal) and I even saw their CEO, who I had a few phone conversations with earlier this year, so I'm looking forward to meeting him in person. I got home around midnight, so here are a few blurry pictures I took:
